articles.title: AI-based traffic system to curb violations and accidents in state
articles.description: In an ambitious move to tackle traffic woes, Bihar is rolling out a cutting-edge Intelligent Traffic Management System. This innovative initiative will harness AI technology, Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) cameras, and smart signaling to alleviate congestion and reduce accidents. With the deployment of over 500 cameras to monitor infractions, the system will issue electronic fines to encourage rule adherence.

articles.title: V-Guard launches Zivardo 100 Air Cooler: Specs and features
articles.description: V-Guard unveils the Zivardo 100, a powerful new air cooler designed for large Indian spaces. Featuring a 100-litre tank, 20-meter air throw, and antifungal honeycomb pads, it promises efficient cooling even in challenging summers. Its hard water-resistant pump and user-friendly features ensure durability and ease of use, backed by a solid warranty and extensive service network.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki lines up record capex of Rs 14k cr to add capacity
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki plans a record Rs 14,000 crore capital expenditure for FY27. This investment will expand manufacturing capacity to meet rising demand, especially for small cars. The company is adding new production lines in Haryana and Gujarat. This expansion is crucial as existing facilities operate at full capacity with a significant backlog of orders.

articles.title: Japan tests humanoid robots at Tokyo Haneda Airport to tackle labour shortage crisis
articles.description: Japan is turning to humanoid robots to tackle severe labour shortages at its busiest airport. As tourism surges and the workforce shrinks, Japan Airlines is testing AI-powered machines to handle baggage and cargo, signalling a broader shift towards automation in industries long reliant on human precision and discipline.

articles.title: Mini Convertible goes sporty with JCW Pack at Rs 61.5 lakh: Details
articles.description: The Mini Convertible JCW Pack features a black soft top, that can be fully opened in 18 seconds at speeds of up to 30 km/h, with the window bars and side windows lowering simultaneously. The soft top closes in 15 seconds and it can also be partially opened up to 40 cm, functioning like a sunroof, regardless of speed. Boot space stands at 160 litres with the roof down and increases to 215 litres when the top is closed.

articles.title: ReBid launches agentic AI-powered tool to benchmark creative performance
articles.description: ReBid introduces a new AI tool to help brands understand competitor advertising. This technology analyzes ads across platforms like Meta and Google. It helps marketers benchmark their messages and create better ads. The tool automates competitor tracking, saving time. Brands can now make faster, smarter creative decisions. This empowers them to stand out in the competitive digital market.

This move provides an additional layer of protection beyond existing copyright laws.

Huawei Watch Fit 5, Nova 15 Max and MatePad Pro...

articles.description: Tired of missing key AI developments, Parminder Singh created AI Radar, a daily digest delivered to his notes app. By identifying trusted sources, using an agentic platform for browsing and scheduling, and crafting precise prompts, he receives curated AI news.

articles.title: Anthropic Mythos: Firms with access to model say speed of response, not uncovering flaws, is key
articles.description: A new AI model, Mythos, drastically shrinks the time between discovering and exploiting software vulnerabilities, creating a critical "kill zone" for companies. Indian firms, with slow patching cycles, face significant risk as AI-driven attacks become faster and more accessible, necessitating a shift to continuous, machine-speed security.

articles.title: One giant leap for AI: Companies rethink how and where data is processed
articles.description: Big tech and startups are developing orbital data centers to process AI-driven data in space, reducing latency and energy use. This edge computing approach allows satellites to prioritize and transmit high-value data, enhancing mission autonomy and enabling quicker insights for sectors like defense and climate monitoring.
